text: There is much uncertainty about the text and the meaning here. But, since the Hebrews used the word ‘honour’ to imply a gift of money (cf. Ecclus. 38.1; I Tim. 5.3) it is clear that our Lord refers to some shift by which sons were allowed to neglect the support of their parents. This was done, it appears, by a real or pretended consecration of themselves to God.
